title: Specialized Information and Referral * Youth Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Specialized Information and Referral * Youth Issues 8 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Youth Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HOSEA YOUTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides meals, clothing, laundry, personal hygiene items, showers, job training classes, mentoring programs, referrals to other resources, and access to telephone and computer services. For the winter season, offering tents, sleeping bags, and blankets. 834 Monroe Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Ages 16-24 with a focus on individuals experiencing or at risk of homelessness Hours: Monday-Thursday 11am-6:30pm, Friday 11am-3pm Lunch: noon-2pm Dinner: 5pm Email (541) 344-5583 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides street outreach and individual case management for youth and young adults. Offers support, case management, and goal-setting tools to help identify and work towards future goals. Financial help and referrals to obtain interview clothes, laundry, obtain a birth certificate, Social Security card, ID, CPR/First Aid, or Food Handlers certification. Family mediation is available for families needing to work through a specific conflict. 225 SW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Ages 10-24. Individuals from outside the service area will not be turned away. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday by appointment Email (800) 901-2904 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES YOUTH SERVICE CENTER AND DROP IN OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop in center with street outreach and individual case management. Offers support, resources, referral help, and physical items. Case management and goal setting can be set up to help an individual name and work towards future goals. Family mediation is also available for families needing to work through a specific conflict. Financial help and referrals for youth needing to do laundry, obtain interview clothes, or obtain a birth certificate, Social Security card, ID, CPR/First Aid, or Food Handlers certification is also available. 1025 Pacific Boulevard SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Ages 10-24. Individuals from outside the service area will not be turned away. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday by appointment Email (800) 901-2904 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO NETWORK PADRINOS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mentorship services for youth facing challenges in their schools and communities who are at low to mid-risk of community violence. Mentors offer support with goal setting, school success, career planning, and personal development. Can also provide a connection to community resources and activities. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Age 13-18 Latine with a family member impacted by the justice system Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 830-1554 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support services, including counseling, support groups, violence and anger prevention training, life skills groups, parenting classes, new parenting groups, crime victims support, community information and referral and temporary housing. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Ages 6-21 and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 386-6665 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE HARBOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a day center, domestic and sexual violence advocacy, culturally specific LGBTQ2+ and Latinx services, relocation assistance, transportation to a safe location, accompaniment to medical or forensic exams, assistance applying for Crime Victims Compensation, and information and referral to community agencies. Provides educational programs. These programs focus on raising awareness about the dynamics of domestic and sexual violence, understanding trauma, and promoting prevention strategies within the community. Currently accepting volunteers. 801 Commercial Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Age 14 and older Hours: Advocacy Office: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-4pm, Wednesday 9am-noon, closed 1st Wednesday of every month. Online Chat and Text: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Email (503) 325-5735 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP YOUTH OUTREACH SERVICES YOUTH OUTREACH DROP-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a youth center with access to academic supports, mental health supports, employment assistance, after-school activities, food such as snacks and staple items, clothing, hygiene supplies, and information and referral relating to in-house shelter services. 719 E 1st Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Ages 11-24 Hours: Drop in: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon Appointment only: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday noon-8pm, Wednesday 9am-8pm, (503) 472-0457 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP YOUTH OUTREACH SERVICES MCMINNVILLE YOUTH OUTREACH DROP-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a youth center with access to academic supports, mental health supports, employment assistance, after-school activities, food such as snacks and staple items, clothing, hygiene supplies, and information and referral relating to in-house shelter services. 335 NE 6th Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Ages 11-24 Hours: Drop in: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon Appointment only: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday noon-8pm, Wednesday 9am-8pm, (503) 538-8023 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOSEA YOUTH SERVICES HOSEA YOUTH SERVICES JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES OUTREACH JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES OUTREACH LATINO NETWORK PADRINOS NEXT DOOR YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES THE HARBOR THE HARBOR YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP YOUTH OUTREACH DROP-IN CENTER YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP YOUTH OUTREACH DROP-IN CENTER
